adjudication_raw: Votes: a1=critique_wins, a2=critique_wins, a3=critique_wins. Unanimous: critique_wins
assessor_1_raw: Assessor 1: Pretraining scope unspecified — potential temporal leakage. Censoring bias in test set. Verdict: critique_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Assessor 2: SSL pretraining using future data is a serious concern. Test set censoring exclusion biases evaluation. Verdict: critique_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Assessor 3: Architecture confounder and pretraining leakage are material. Verdict: critique_wins.
